task_completion.description: Verify that the dive log application (Subsurface) is open with the dive log database loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface application window is visible, displaying a list of dives.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has located and selected the target dive site ('Sund Rock' or 'Sund Rock, WA') for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dive at 'Sund Rock' is selected in the dive list, or the 'Manage Dive Sites' window is open with 'Sund Rock' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Country field for the dive site has been updated to 'USA'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'USA' is visible in the 'Country' input field within the dive site location editing pane or window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the State field for the dive site has been updated to 'Washington'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Washington' is visible in the 'State' or 'Province' input field within the dive site location editing pane or window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the City field for the dive site has been updated to 'Hoodsport'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Hoodsport' is visible in the 'City' input field within the dive site location editing pane or window.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent saved the changes to the dive log file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save' (File -> Save, or the save icon), or there is no unsaved changes indicator (like an asterisk) next to the filename in the title bar.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the application's graphical user interface to edit the dive site.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Subsurface GUI (menus, text fields, buttons) rather than a text editor (like vim or nano) modifying the raw XML file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing sed, awk, python, or other scripts being executed to modify the .ssrf file directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually typed or selected the taxonomy fields in the correct input boxes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 'USA', 'Washington', and 'Hoodsport' are placed in their respective, distinct input fields, not just appended to the site name string.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target dive site is 'Sund Rock' (or 'Sund Rock, WA'). The expected geographic taxonomy to be verified in the input fields is Country: USA, State: Washington, City: Hoodsport.
